results.label: First ever message
results.message: Hello I want to start using bizpulse
results.response:
Hey Ngozi! Welcome 🎉

I'm Kemi, your BizPulse assistant. Think of me as your business partner right here on WhatsApp.

I can help you track your sales and stock, record expenses, monitor who owes you money, and show you how your provisions store is performing — daily, weekly, anytime.

Just tell me what's happening in your shop and I'll handle the numbers. So, how did today go? Any sales to log?
results.note: First message — Kemi should introduce herself by name

results.label: Goal setting
results.message: I want to make 500k this month
results.response:
Monthly revenue goal set — ₦500,000 💪

Every sale you log, I'll be tracking your progress towards that target. The more you update me, the better I can help you hit it. 

So what sold today?
results.note: Trader sets monthly revenue goal

results.label: Opening stock log — multi item pidgin
results.message: I don restock this morning. carry come 10 carton indomie, 5 carton peak milk, 20 bottle coke, 3 bag rice (50kg each)
results.response:
Your goal of ₦500k this month is locked in too ✅

All restocks recorded:
10 cartons Indomie, 5 cartons Peak Milk, 20 bottles Coke, 3 bags Rice (50kg)

As you start selling, I'll track everything and let you know when stock is running low. What did you sell today?
results.note: Multi-item restock in pidgin
